title: Soccer: Still the Road is Full of Zombies
description:
Get ready for the most unfitting YTPMV ever.

Round 5 with levusbevus.

Video: Left 4 Dead series
Audio: Super Mario RPG - Still the Road is Full of Danger

Some parts are a bit loud or messy but I was going for amusing not pleasant.

Thanks for the match Levus it was a lot of fun!
